display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（挨打猫 v1.2・小小维修兔 v1.32・文生图测试版 v2D）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: fixes the image-generation root detector so both wrapped <toto> mirrors and host-rendered orphan <details> mirrors create an image frame. Adds an independent DOM observer, preserves one-request-per-generation deduplication, and keeps the 2D free/custom image modes and Feedback Cat language-delivery fix.
